description: Resource type definition for a Cognito Sync Dataset. A dataset is a collection of key-value pairs per identity that can store up to 1 MB of data and sync across devices.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the dataset.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the dataset.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

IdentityPoolId.description: A name-spaced GUID (for example, us-east-1:23EC4050-6AEA-7089-A2DD-08002EXAMPLE) created by Amazon Cognito.
IdentityPoolId.markdownDescription:
A name-spaced GUID (for example, us-east-1:23EC4050-6AEA-7089-A2DD-08002EXAMPLE) created by Amazon Cognito.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 55  
Pattern: ^[\w-]+:[0-9a-f-]+$  
Update requires: Replacement

IdentityId.description: A name-spaced GUID (for example, us-east-1:23EC4050-6AEA-7089-A2DD-08002EXAMPLE) created by Amazon Cognito.
IdentityId.markdownDescription:
A name-spaced GUID (for example, us-east-1:23EC4050-6AEA-7089-A2DD-08002EXAMPLE) created by Amazon Cognito.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 55  
Pattern: ^[\w-]+:[0-9a-f-]+$  
Update requires: Replacement

DatasetName.description: A string of up to 128 characters. Allowed characters are a-z, A-Z, 0-9, underscore, dash, and dot.
DatasetName.markdownDescription:
A string of up to 128 characters. Allowed characters are a-z, A-Z, 0-9, underscore, dash, and dot.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9_.:-]+$  
Update requires: Replacement

CreationDate.description: Date on which the dataset was created.
CreationDate.markdownDescription:
Date on which the dataset was created.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

LastModifiedDate.description: Date when the dataset was last modified.
LastModifiedDate.markdownDescription:
Date when the dataset was last modified.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

LastModifiedBy.description: The device that made the last change to this dataset.
LastModifiedBy.markdownDescription:
The device that made the last change to this dataset.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

DataStorage.description: Total size in bytes of the records in this dataset.
DataStorage.markdownDescription:
Total size in bytes of the records in this dataset.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

NumRecords.description: Number of records in this dataset.
NumRecords.markdownDescription:
Number of records in this dataset.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
